alt: Night view of Parque del Amor on the Miraflores cliffs — Víctor Delfín's bronze sculpture "El Beso" of a reclining kissing couple visible at center under warm streetlight, framed by palm trees, with the curved mosaic walls partially visible to the right and red flowers in the foreground gardens
description: Parque del Amor in Miraflores at night, with Víctor Delfín's 1993 sculpture "El Beso" (The Kiss) lit on its stone pedestal among palm trees on the cliff above the Pacific. The Gaudí-inspired mosaic walls curve along the right side. Photographed under Peruvian freedom-of-panorama (Copyright Law Article 41) for permanently-installed public art.
title: Noche en el Parque del Amor, Miraflores. Lima, Perú
